headline: Risk-on extends; NTLA +23% leads biotech surge, FOXA -17% on volume — DELL AI ripple unpriced in SMCI/ANET

market_state.line: SPY +1.76%, QQQ +3.12%, VXX stress 0.89 — tape firmly bid, low vol, green light for momentum longs but overbought names need clean entries.

actions.line: Quarter size only — fresh catalyst, but signal flags late chase; crude oil 3-month low cuts jet fuel costs, adds macro tailwind.
Half size — cleanest technical setup in the book; signal + low risk severity; no news but tape is supportive.

watch.line: High-confidence DELL AI server blowout ripple — share-loss fears easing; most direct pure-play beneficiary not yet priced.
-16.84% on 11.85x relative volume, oversold + MACD bearish — watch for either dead-cat bounce or continuation flush.
+23.34% on 2x volume, MACD bullish — biotech momentum leader; needs a base before entry.
